summary: AI study app that turns notes into flashcards, quizzes, and streak-based learning loops.
editor_note: Most study apps still behave like digital stationery; the sharper move is designing for the attention span TikTok trained instead. Gizmo pairs AI-generated flashcards with streaks, leaderboards, limited lives, and social challenges; it reaches 13 million users in 120 countries. Instead of asking students to become more disciplined, it is betting that better habits can piggyback on addictive product design. The risk is that engagement mechanics outrun learning depth once the novelty wears off.
investors: Shine Capital, Ada Ventures, Seek Investments, GSV, NFX
